title: Kazan、Tatarstan — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kazan、Tatarstan的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kazan是Tatarstan的一個城市，人口約1,260,000。The capital of Tatarstan, a vibrant city where Russian and Tatar cultures blend, famous for its stunning white Kremlin and mosque.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
